format.c(3) Library Functions Manual format.c(3)

NAME

format.c - 📊 Byte size formatting utilities for human-readable output (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB, EB)

SYNOPSIS

Functions


void format_bytes_pretty (size_t bytes, char *out, size_t out_capacity)

Detailed Description

📊 Byte size formatting utilities for human-readable output (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB, EB)

Definition in file util/format.c.

Function Documentation

void format_bytes_pretty (size_t bytes, char * out, size_t out_capacity)

Definition at line 10 of file util/format.c.

10                                                                        {
11   const double KB = 1024.0;
12   const double MB = KB * 1024.0;
13   const double GB = MB * 1024.0;
14   const double TB = GB * 1024.0;
15   const double PB = TB * 1024.0;
16   const double EB = PB * 1024.0;
17 
18   const double THRESHOLD = 0.8;
19 
20   double byte_val = (double)bytes;
21 
22   if (byte_val < THRESHOLD * KB) {
23     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%zu B", bytes));
24   } else if (byte_val < THRESHOLD * MB) {
25     double value = byte_val / KB;
26     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%.2f KB", value));
27   } else if (byte_val < THRESHOLD * GB) {
28     double value = byte_val / MB;
29     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%.2f MB", value));
30   } else if (byte_val < THRESHOLD * TB) {
31     double value = byte_val / GB;
32     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%.2f GB", value));
33   } else if (byte_val < THRESHOLD * PB) {
34     double value = byte_val / TB;
35     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%.2f TB", value));
36   } else if (byte_val < THRESHOLD * EB) {
37     double value = byte_val / PB;
38     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%.2f PB", value));
39   } else {
40     double value = byte_val / EB;
41     SAFE_IGNORE_PRINTF_RESULT(safe_snprintf(out, out_capacity, "%.2f EB", value));
42   }
43 }




References safe_snprintf().

    buffer_pool_log_stats(), crypto_destroy(),
    frame_check_size_overflow(), frame_validate_new(),
    handle_image_frame_packet(),
    packet_decode_frame_data_malloc(), and
    packet_validate_frame_dimensions().
